# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '50'))
    }

    parameters {
        text(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'One artifact URL per line. Supports HTTP/HTTPS/S3-style URLs if curl can access them.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app',
            description: 'Target deployment path on production servers'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: 'prod-app-01\nprod-app-02',
            description: 'One production server per line'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REMOTE_USER',
            defaultValue: 'deploy',
            description: 'SSH user for production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SSH_PORT',
            defaultValue: '22',
            description: 'SSH port'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SSH credentials ID for server access',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.sshcredentials.impl.BasicSSHUserPrivateKey'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'CLEAN_DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Clean deployment path before copying artifacts'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'VERIFY_CHECKSUMS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Verify checksums using optional .sha256 URL next to each artifact'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTHCHECK_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'test -e ${DEPLOY_PATH}',
            description: 'Command to run on each server after deployment'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloads"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    if (!urls) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URLS must contain at least one URL')
                    }

                    if (!servers) {
                        error('PRODUCTION_SERVERS must contain at least one server')
                    }

                    urls.each { u ->
                        if (!(u ==~ /^(https?|s3):\/\/.+/)) {
                            error("Unsupported URL format: ${u}")
                        }
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST = urls.join('\n')
                    env.SERVER_LIST = servers.join('\n')
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -euo pipefail
                    rm -rf "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"
                    mkdir -p "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split('\n').findAll { it?.trim() }

                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/').last()
                        if (!fileName || fileName.trim().isEmpty()) {
                            fileName = "artifact_${idx + 1}"
                        }

                        sh """#!/bin/bash
                            set -euo pipefail
                            target="\$DOWNLOAD_DIR/${fileName}"
                            echo "Downloading ${url} -> \$target"
                            curl -fL --retry 3 --connect-timeout 30 -o "\$target" "${url}"
                            test -s "\$target"
                        """

                        if (params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS) {
                            sh """#!/bin/bash
                                set -euo pipefail
                                target="\$DOWNLOAD_DIR/${fileName}"
                                checksum_url="${url}.sha256"
                                checksum_file="\$DOWNLOAD_DIR/${fileName}.sha256"
                                echo "Downloading checksum \$checksum_url"
                                curl -fL --retry 3 --connect-timeout 30 -o "\$checksum_file" "\$checksum_url"
                                expected=\$(awk '{print \$1}' "\$checksum_file")
                                actual=\$(sha256sum "\$target" | awk '{print \$1}')
                                test "\$expected" = "\$actual"
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('List Downloaded Artifacts') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -euo pipefail
                    ls -lah "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split('\n').findAll { it?.trim() }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            sh """#!/bin/bash
                                set -euo pipefail
                                remote="${params.REMOTE_USER}@${server}"
                                ssh_opts="-p ${params.SSH_PORT} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no"

                                ssh \$ssh_opts "\$remote" "mkdir -p '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'"

                                if [ "${params.CLEAN_DEPLOY_PATH}" = "true" ]; then
                                  ssh \$ssh_opts "\$remote" "find '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}' -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -exec rm -rf {} +"
                                fi

                                scp \$ssh_opts "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"/* "\$remote:'${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/'"

                                health_cmd='${params.HEALTHCHECK_COMMAND.replace("'", "'\"'\"'")}'
                                ssh \$ssh_opts "\$remote" "DEPLOY_PATH='${params.DEPLOY_PATH}' bash -lc \\"\$health_cmd\\""
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully.'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed.'
        }
        always {
            sh '''
                set +e
                rm -rf "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"
            '''
        }
    }
}
